ops.body: P1 shipped as c8ec271f (CI green 23s: CI + cc-notes + Guides; 805 pytest + 47 node + ruff + ty locally). All four postmortem retrieval fixes: (c) sweeps paginate via typed PaginationResult with order_by=lowest_mileage under SWEEP_PAGE_BUDGET=3, quota estimate = (widen+1)*pages; (b) superseded-row disclosure computed atomically inside the store ingest transaction (count exact, ids capped 50), threaded to shortlist provenance — supersede semantics stand, silence fixed; (a) home-origin floor in shortlist selection, narrowed to prefs.home_airport only after both reviewers proved the declared-origin classifier wrong (MEX/SEA region/airport collisions, executed repro) — declared-origin flooring returns as explicit leg-intents in P2b; (d) mixed-cabin /trips acceptance with one shared predicate across live+cached paths, per-segment cabins preserved. Review trail: 3 sol finder/refuter rounds; review-caught majors fixed: mid-pagination partial-progress loss (both reviewers independently reproduced — PaginationError now carries rows/calls/cause; partial never reads not_run), store open-transaction bug, validator scope. Sol lane went quota-dead (resets 19:40 PT) before the final close-out review — fable finder+refuter dispatched against the landed commit per the escalation rule; any accepted findings become a follow-up commit. Wrapper-reporting papercuts hit 3x (junk schema output, retry-cap swallowing a completed lane) — tree-diff verification caught every one.
